title: RCG (64x to 1024x) TexturePacks
body:
### Current Update: 20 (6-August-2025)

## **Welcome to the RCG (Realistic Crafted Graphics) Modrinth**

Hello! I’m the creator of RCG. Welcome to my page, where I showcase my realistic Minecraft texture pack. My goal is to enhance your gameplay with lifelike textures and visuals—making every block and item feel more immersive and captivating.

### **How to Get Started**

*   **Free Textures**: Download a free 64x texture pack here on [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/user/RCGTexturePacks) or [CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/members/rcgtexturepacks/projects).
    
*   **Download**: You can download the 128x, 256x, 512x, 1024x resource packs from my [Patreon](https://www.patreon.com/RCGTextures).
  
* [Difference between 64x, 128x, 256x, 512x, 1024x, 2048x, 4096x (Click Here)]([https://www.patreon.com/posts/clear-difference-111985188?utm_medium=clipboard_copy&utm_source=copyLink&utm_campaign=postshare_creator&utm_content=join_link](https://www.patreon.com/posts/clear-difference-111985188?utm_medium=clipboard_copy&utm_source=copyLink&utm_campaign=postshare_creator&utm_content=join_link))
    
*   **Shader Settings**: Use my [Custom Shader Settings](https://mega.nz/folder/BvsjHbjB#kDGAvlo5S-zMd5Uw5pEXOQ) if you don't have any.
    

    

I handle every part of RCG myself, so your support really helps keep it going and growing. 

With monthly updates and ongoing improvements, your support keeps this project thriving. Let’s make Minecraft more stunning together!
